title: Establish canonical docs entrypoints and source-of-truth rules
required_tests: docs link sweep; path existence check; stale-reference grep
acceptance_criteria: Replace root planning entrypoints so they point only to docs/program/README.md; declare docs/program/README.md the single canonical planning entrypoint; mark every other planning doc as canonical or historical.

title: Archive stale planning and historical run artifacts
required_tests: archive index generation; no live doc points at archived file without explicit historical label
acceptance_criteria: Create docs/archive/README.md; reconstruct deleted Wave 3/4 run artifacts plus cleanup/deprecation records from git history into docs/archive/; remove archived files from canonical entrypoint links.

title: Normalize status board and merged baseline history
required_tests: status/backlog consistency check; merged baseline presence check
acceptance_criteria: Backfill Wave 1-4, repo cleanup, and legacy decommission as merged/completed baseline; remove stale in_progress states for already-merged work; make backlog.csv the task-level source of truth and status_board.md the human dashboard.

title: Add doc freshness metadata and registry
required_tests: metadata header parser test; registry completeness check
acceptance_criteria: Require Status, Owner, Last updated, and Canonical source headers on every live planning doc; add a registry of live planning docs and ownership in docs/program/doc_governance.md.

title: Add doc consistency checker and CI gate
required_tests: unit tests for parser/rules; CI dry-run; failure fixture for stale status and missing metadata
acceptance_criteria: Fail CI when status_board.md, backlog.csv, or live planning headers drift; fail CI on broken internal doc links; fail CI when archived files remain linked from live entrypoints.

title: Expand agent ownership map for target runtime boundaries
required_tests: agent index schema validation for owner_pool owner_module invariants and safe_edit_boundaries; ownership coverage check for ARC planned runtime modules
acceptance_criteria: Add ownership and invariants for ARC runtime modules src/dnd_sim/engine_runtime.py src/dnd_sim/action_legality.py src/dnd_sim/movement_runtime.py src/dnd_sim/action_resolution.py src/dnd_sim/effects_runtime.py src/dnd_sim/reaction_runtime.py src/dnd_sim/spell_runtime.py src/dnd_sim/replay.py and src/dnd_sim/reporting_runtime.py; require every runtime-affecting PR in ARC CAP OBS DBS AI FIX WLD and FIN to update docs/agent_index.yaml in the same branch.

title: Extract simulation session and turn-loop orchestration from engine.py
required_tests: runtime contract tests; deterministic seed replay tests; integration smoke tests
acceptance_criteria: Create src/dnd_sim/engine_runtime.py and move session setup, initiative loop, and round progression into it; leave engine.py as a stable facade; reduce engine.py line count on this task.

title: Extract turn declaration validation and legal action service
required_tests: unit legality tests; invalid declaration tests; integration tests for legal turn declaration
acceptance_criteria: Create src/dnd_sim/action_legality.py for declaration validation, action economy checks, and structured legality errors; route engine and strategy API validation through it.

title: Extract movement, routing, and spatial legality service
required_tests: path legality tests; movement cost tests; forced movement and opportunity attack tests
acceptance_criteria: Create src/dnd_sim/movement_runtime.py to own movement budget, routing, difficult terrain, forced movement, and spatial legality; remove duplicate movement logic from engine.py.

title: Extract action resolution pipeline
required_tests: attack/spell/item action integration tests; invalid target negative tests; deterministic combat regressions
acceptance_criteria: Create src/dnd_sim/action_resolution.py to own action dispatch, target application, hit/save handling, and result objects; route all combat action execution through the new module.

title: Extract effect lifecycle, condition state, and concentration graph service
required_tests: effect duration tests; concentration lifecycle tests; condition stacking and cleanup tests
acceptance_criteria: Create src/dnd_sim/effects_runtime.py to own effect creation, ticking, expiration, concentration graph updates, and derived state recomputation.

title: Extract reactions, interrupts, and ready-action window manager
required_tests: reaction window tests; ready action tests; opportunity attack and interrupt legality tests
acceptance_criteria: Create src/dnd_sim/reaction_runtime.py to own reaction windows, trigger matching, ready action release, and interrupt ordering; remove reaction timing branches from engine.py.

title: Extract spell execution pipeline and target resolution adapters
required_tests: spell family integration tests; upcast legality tests; target mode negative tests
acceptance_criteria: Create src/dnd_sim/spell_runtime.py to own spell declaration normalization, slot use, upcast handling, target resolution, and spell-result application; remove spell-specific branches from engine.py.

title: Extract replay/reporting adapter layer and reduce engine.py to an orchestration facade
required_tests: replay serialization tests; simulation summary tests; deterministic diff tests
acceptance_criteria: Create src/dnd_sim/replay.py and src/dnd_sim/reporting_runtime.py; route replay/report emission through them; reduce engine.py below 3500 lines and keep every extracted runtime module below 1500 lines.

title: Define capability manifest schema, storage format, and CLI
required_tests: schema validation tests; CLI smoke test; manifest round-trip tests
acceptance_criteria: Define a canonical manifest schema with states cataloged, schema_valid, executable, tested, blocked, and unsupported_reason; add a CLI to emit manifest files deterministically.

title: Generate spell capability manifest from canonical spell data
required_tests: spell import tests; executable coverage tests; unsupported spell reason tests
acceptance_criteria: Generate a spell manifest for every canonical 2014 spell and mark each record executable, blocked, or unsupported with a single reason code.

title: Generate feat, trait, background, and species capability manifest
required_tests: feature manifest tests; duplicate content id tests; unsupported feature reason tests
acceptance_criteria: Generate manifests for feats, traits, backgrounds, and species content; require each record to declare its runtime hook family and support state.

title: Generate monster and monster-action capability manifest
required_tests: monster parser integration tests; action support tests; unsupported action reason tests
acceptance_criteria: Generate manifests for monsters, monster actions, reactions, legendary actions, lair actions, recharge features, and innate spellcasting entries.

title: Enforce capability manifest gates in import paths and CI
required_tests: import failure tests; CI gate dry-run; blocked-record fixture tests
acceptance_criteria: Fail import or CI when shipped 2014 content lacks schema_valid or tested state for supported scope; require explicit unsupported_reason codes for blocked scope.

title: Publish machine-readable and markdown coverage reports
required_tests: report generation tests; stable ordering tests; markdown snapshot tests
acceptance_criteria: Publish deterministic JSON and markdown reports for content coverage and link them from docs/program/README.md.

title: Introduce structured event schema and module-level loggers
required_tests: telemetry schema tests; logger presence tests; event serialization tests
acceptance_criteria: Create src/dnd_sim/telemetry.py with JSON-compatible event schemas; add module-level loggers to runtime modules; emit structured event envelopes instead of ad hoc print/debug output.

title: Emit turn declaration and action resolution traces
required_tests: trace completeness tests; deterministic ordering tests; illegal action trace tests
acceptance_criteria: Emit a structured trace record for declaration validation, action selection, action resolution, and final action outcome on every turn.

title: Emit actor state delta and effect lifecycle traces
required_tests: state delta snapshot tests; effect lifecycle trace tests; no-op delta suppression tests
acceptance_criteria: Emit before/after actor state deltas and effect lifecycle events for apply, tick, refresh, expire, and concentration break transitions.

title: Emit AI candidate scoring and rationale traces
required_tests: candidate coverage tests; score component tests; rationale schema tests
acceptance_criteria: Emit full candidate sets, score components, selected action, and rejection reasons for every AI-controlled turn.

title: Emit resource delta, RNG audit, and invariant violation events
required_tests: resource delta tests; RNG audit determinism tests; invariant emission tests
acceptance_criteria: Emit structured events for resource spend/recovery, RNG draws keyed by seed and context, and invariant violations with explicit codes.

title: Build replay bundle writer, loader, and diff harness
required_tests: replay round-trip tests; diff harness tests; schema compatibility tests
acceptance_criteria: Persist complete replay bundles with inputs, seeds, traces, and outcome summary; provide a deterministic diff harness for comparing two bundles.

title: Establish golden trace corpus and trace review gate
required_tests: golden trace snapshot tests; intentional delta approval path test
acceptance_criteria: Create a golden trace corpus covering combat, hazards, summons, reactions, and world flows; fail CI on unapproved trace drift.

title: Add canonical metadata tables for content and support records
required_tests: schema migration tests; round-trip insert/query tests; rollback tests
acceptance_criteria: Add canonical tables content_records and content_capabilities with content_id, content_type, source_book, schema_version, source_hash, payload_json, support_state, unsupported_reason, and last_verified_commit.

title: Add schema version, source lineage, and content hash persistence
required_tests: hash stability tests; lineage migration tests; duplicate hash handling tests
acceptance_criteria: Persist schema_version, source_path, source_hash, canonicalization_hash, and imported_at for every content record and replay the lineage deterministically.

title: Add query APIs and CLI for support coverage, schema version, and lineage
required_tests: query API tests; CLI output snapshot tests; invalid query tests
acceptance_criteria: Expose query APIs and CLI commands for content lookup by content_id, type, support_state, unsupported_reason, source_book, and schema version.

title: Add campaign state persistence schema and round-trip tests
required_tests: campaign round-trip tests; snapshot compatibility tests; corruption negative tests
acceptance_criteria: Add campaign_states and encounter_states storage with deterministic save/load semantics for party state, resources, active effects, initiative context, and replay linkage.

title: Add world flags, objectives, factions, and encounter state persistence schema
required_tests: world flag lifecycle tests; objective persistence tests; faction round-trip tests
acceptance_criteria: Add world_states and faction_states storage with deterministic lifecycle for flags, reputations, scripted objectives, map state, and encounter wave progression.

title: Migrate existing JSON/blob content to the canonical metadata model
required_tests: backfill tests; rollback tests; mixed-old-new read tests
acceptance_criteria: Backfill existing persisted records into canonical metadata and state tables; preserve read compatibility during migration and remove transitional paths at completion.

title: Normalize candidate action enumeration and scoring inputs
required_tests: candidate completeness tests; illegal candidate exclusion tests; scoring input snapshot tests
acceptance_criteria: Create src/dnd_sim/ai/scoring.py; enumerate all legal candidates for an actor turn with normalized scoring inputs for range, hazard, concentration, control, objective, and resource state.

title: Implement hazard, geometry, cover, and line-of-effect scoring
required_tests: hazard scenario tests; cover scoring tests; aoe friendly-fire tests
acceptance_criteria: Score hazard exposure, route quality, geometry, cover, line-of-effect, and friendly-fire penalties directly in the AI scoring layer.

title: Implement concentration breaking, control value, and disable value scoring
required_tests: concentration break tests; control spell target tests; disable valuation tests
acceptance_criteria: Add scoring components for concentration disruption, control effects, condition application value, and enemy action-denial value.

title: Implement retreat, survival, objective race, and focus-fire tradeoff scoring
required_tests: retreat threshold tests; objective race tests; focus-fire tradeoff tests
acceptance_criteria: Add scoring components for survival thresholds, disengage/retreat timing, objective racing, ally rescue, and focus-fire tradeoffs.

title: Implement recharge, legendary, reaction-bait, and limited-resource timing heuristics
required_tests: recharge timing tests; legendary action tests; reaction bait tests; limited-use timing tests

acceptance_criteria: Create a benchmark corpus with hazard-heavy, objective-heavy, summon-heavy, and legendary/recharge encounters; require the primary tactical AI to beat BaseStrategy and HighestThreatStrategy on objective-adjusted outcomes while producing full rationale traces.

title: Close Lucky attacker, defender, and saving throw correctness
required_tests: Lucky attacker tests; Lucky defender tests; Lucky save tests; negative use-limit tests
